title: Half-Life Splash Texts
description: Adds 124 Half-Life-related splashes to the main menu!
body:
Adds 124 Half-Life related splash texts!\
\
These are mostly in-game dialogue, as well as a handful of references to the community.\
This is entirely based on Half-Life 1.\
All texts have a similar style to the quirky messages in vanilla.\
\
A complete list can be found [here](https://pastebin.com/dUF0wJPA).\
\
\
\
\
\
Side note: I don't know much about the Half-Life series, so the references may be limited. I just like the silly scientist dialogue.
